title: Legislative members of boards and commissions; per diem
doc_html:
§3.1.  Legislative members of boards and commissions; per diem

Each legislative member of a board or commission shall receive a per diem equal to the per diem provided by law for members of the legislature.

Added by Acts 1981, No. 221, §1.
doc_text:
§3.1.  Legislative members of boards and commissions; per diem
Each legislative member of a board or commission shall receive a per diem equal to the per diem provided by law for members of the legislature.
Added by Acts 1981, No. 221, §1.
